svg.title: Data Chaos Monkey architecture, refined
svg.desc: A CLI drives a static-analysis loader that reads the manifest and emits a guard map and lineage. An immutable dbt project feeds the manifest to the loader and a duckdb clone to the injector. Inside a per-fault loop on the clone, the injector applies one of six faults, a two-pass dbt runner rebuilds and tests, and a verdict classifier checksums the output. The four possible verdicts are colour-coded: caught in green, crashed in amber, silent in red as the leak, and no-op in gray. Results roll up into a resilience report.
